semanticDeltas.definition: Combine two or more role-compatible quantities before or after the core computation.
Increase or decrease a per-unit quantity before applying the core repeated-quantity structure.
Recover an unknown part from a known total and known complementary parts.
Recover total or a missing value from an integer average and count.
Add or remove one member or period and recompute an integer average.
Perform one grouping operation and then operate on the resulting groups.
Apply one explicit discount, extra use, offset or near-round compensation after the base quantity is established.
Compare two mathematical models or transformed expressions and judge structural equivalence.

knowledgePointMatrix.nBaseline: Evaluate one complete integer expression using multiplication/division before addition/subtraction and left-to-right within equal precedence.
knowledgePointMatrix.nPlus1Definition: Translate one contextual adjustment into a single mixed-operation expression while preserving operation order.

knowledgePointMatrix.nBaseline: Regroup signed integer addends and subtrahends into an equivalent convenient calculation without treating subtraction as associative.
Regroup multiplication factors and denominator factors so the result remains integer and division direction is preserved.
knowledgePointMatrix.nPlus1Definition: Model a two-level grouping or group-selection relation with exactly one nested-grouping delta.

knowledgePointMatrix.nBaseline: Expand (a+b)c or (a-b)c into ac+bc or ac-bc and evaluate the equivalent integer expression.
knowledgePointMatrix.nPlus1Definition: Adjust one per-unit amount and distribute the repeated count across the adjusted components.

knowledgePointMatrix.nBaseline: Extract a common factor from ac+bc or ac-bc and evaluate the equivalent integer expression.
knowledgePointMatrix.nPlus1Definition: Combine or compare two same-rate groups so the common-factor structure must be recognized.

knowledgePointMatrix.nBaseline: Replace near-round addends with round numbers and apply exact additive compensation.
Replace near-round subtrahends with round numbers and apply direction-correct compensation.
Decompose a near-round factor or regroup exact factors to evaluate a multiplication efficiently.
knowledgePointMatrix.nPlus1Definition: Use one near-round price, quantity or offset relation while keeping the same multiplication core.

knowledgePointMatrix.nBaseline: Infer the unique sequence of +, −, × or ÷ symbols that makes an integer equality true.
Evaluate and compare two expressions, then identify whether a distributive or common-factor transformation is valid.
knowledgePointMatrix.nPlus1Definition: Compare two contextual models for the same situation and identify the single structural mismatch when they are not equivalent.

knowledgePointMatrix.nBaseline: Compute an integer average or balanced share from a known integer total and count.
knowledgePointMatrix.nPlus1Definition: Use exactly one inverse, missing-part or population-update relation beyond the direct-average baseline.

goalDistance.distanceReduced: All eleven KPs now have an explicit N baseline; seven application-capable KPs have allowlisted N+1 semantic deltas; the one-delta rule prevents accidental N+2 scope growth.
remainingBlockers: Application TemplateFamily and SDG ContextVariant contracts are not defined
FormalMapping, answer models and validator contracts are not defined
